feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Bird Attacks RC Plane Hacking the Head of Toy Pilot Figure

link.title: Bird Attacks RC Plane Hacking the Head of Toy Pilot Figure

entry.content: This person was flying a radio-controlled airplane in a field outside Stockholm in Sweden when a bird swooped in for the kill. The plane turned away, but the bird followed it persistently. As it was about to land, the bird swooped over and attacked the plane, knocking out the head of the toy pilot figure sitting in the plane.
entry.summary: This person was flying a radio-controlled airplane in a field outside Stockholm in Sweden when a bird swooped in for the kill. The plane turned away, but the bird followed it persistently. As it was about to land, the bird swooped over and attacked the plane, knocking out the head of the toy pilot figure sitting in the plane.

entry.title: Obono représentée en esclavage: la polémique

link.title: Obono représentée en esclavage: la polémique

entry.content:
C’est une image qui a suscité l’indignation. "Danièle Obono au temps de l’esclavage, le titre s’est affiché dans le numéro de Valeurs Actuelles. La députée de la France Insoumise y est représentée en esclave, une chaîne autour du cou. Malgré des excuses du magazine, l’élue de gauche envisage de porter plainte.
Magazine d’information et d’investigations, « 7 JOURS BFM » apporte un regard différent, posé sur l’actualité de la semaine. Le vendredi, samedi, dimanche, Ronald Guintrange revient au travers de plusieurs longs reportages sur les grands événements de la semaine écoulée. L’occasion de prendre du recul et d’apporter une analyse complète de la rédaction de BFMTV à l’aide d’enquêtes, d’interviews et d’images fortes.
BFMTV, 1ère chaine d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et des directs partout à travers le monde où l’actualité le nécessite. BFMTV, c’est aussi les débats et les grands reportages d’actualité. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.
entry.summary: C’est une image qui a suscité l’indignation. "Danièle Obono au temps de l’esclavage, le titre s’est affiché dans le numéro de Valeurs Actuelles. La députée de la France Insoumise y est représentée en esclave, une chaîne autour du cou. Malgré des excuses du magazine, l’élue de gauche envisage de porter plainte. Magazine d’information et d’investigations, « 7 JOURS BFM » apporte un regard différent, posé sur l’actualité de la semaine. Le vendredi, samedi, dimanche, Ronald Guintrange revient au travers de plusieurs longs reportages sur les grands événements de la semaine écoulée. L’occasion de prendre du recul et d’apporter une analyse complète de la rédaction de BFMTV à l’aide d’enquêtes, d’interviews et d’images fortes. BFMTV, 1ère chaine d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et des directs partout à travers le monde où l’actualité le nécessite. BFMTV, c’est aussi les débats et les grands reportages d’actualité. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.

entry.title: Remembering Pranab Mukherjee: Ex-President, Cong Veteran & Indira Gandhi’s Trusted Confidante

link.title: Remembering Pranab Mukherjee: Ex-President, Cong Veteran & Indira Gandhi’s Trusted Confidante

entry.content:
From his humble beginnings as a lecturer and journalist to gaining confidence of Indira Gandhi as her trusted lieutenant. Here’s remembering the former President of India and veteran Congress leader Pranab Mukherjee, who passed away on Monday, 31 August, at the age of 84.
Video: The Quint
Music: Big Bang Fuzz
entry.summary: From his humble beginnings as a lecturer and journalist to gaining confidence of Indira Gandhi as her trusted lieutenant. Here’s remembering the former President of India and veteran Congress leader Pranab Mukherjee, who passed away on Monday, 31 August, at the age of 84. Video: The Quint Music: Big Bang Fuzz

entry.title: Jennifer Lopez to launch beauty brand

link.title: Jennifer Lopez to launch beauty brand

entry.content: Jennifer Lopez is set to launch her own beauty brand named J.Lo Beauty, according to a recent Instagram post from the star.
entry.summary: Jennifer Lopez is set to launch her own beauty brand named J.Lo Beauty, according to a recent Instagram post from the star.

entry.title: Mera Dil Mera Dushman Episode 52 26th August 2020

link.title: Mera Dil Mera Dushman Episode 52 26th August 2020

entry.content:
Mera Dil Mera Dushman is a story of a young innocent girl Mairah, who gets married to a much older man Zafar for the exchange of money. Unfortunately, she comes face to face with the bitter reality that her one and only love Shameer is now her son-in-law.
Directed By: Ali Raza (Usama)
Written By: Mirza Asim Baig
Cast:
Yasir Nawaz,
Alizey Shah,
Noman Sami,
Laiba Khan,
Amna Malik,
Salman Saeed,
Shazia Gohar,
Anam Tanveer,
Naveed Raza,
Akbar Islam,
Gul E Rana,
Fareeda Shabir,
Fatima Sohail,
Saba Shah,
Malik Raza,
Asiya Irshad,
Watch Every Monday Tuesday &Thursday at 9: 00 PM Only On ARY Digital.
entry.summary: Mera Dil Mera Dushman is a story of a young innocent girl Mairah, who gets married to a much older man Zafar for the exchange of money. Unfortunately, she comes face to face with the bitter reality that her one and only love Shameer is now her son-in-law. Directed By: Ali Raza (Usama) Written By: Mirza Asim Baig Cast: Yasir Nawaz, Alizey Shah, Noman Sami, Laiba Khan, Amna Malik, Salman Saeed, Shazia Gohar, Anam Tanveer, Naveed Raza, Akbar Islam, Gul E Rana, Fareeda Shabir, Fatima Sohail, Saba Shah, Malik Raza, Asiya Irshad, Watch Every Monday Tuesday &Thursday at 9: 00 PM Only On ARY Digital.

entry.title: Jean Castex : ‘Le plan de relance sera annoncé le jeudi 3 septembre. Il est absolument bouclé, je vous rappelle que nous avons déjà versé l’allocation de rentrée scolaire en anticipation de l’annonce du plan.’

link.title: Jean Castex : ‘Le plan de relance sera annoncé le jeudi 3 septembre. Il est absolument bouclé, je vous rappelle que nous avons déjà versé l’allocation de rentrée scolaire en anticipation de l’annonce du plan.’

entry.content:
Le Premier ministre Jean Castex sera mercredi l’invité du Grand Entretien de Léa Salamé et Nicolas Demorand. Un entretien grand format, de 8h15 à 9h. Il répondra aussi aux questions des auditeurs. Un entretien à suivre en direct vidéo
Plus d’info:
entry.summary: Le Premier ministre Jean Castex sera mercredi l’invité du Grand Entretien de Léa Salamé et Nicolas Demorand. Un entretien grand format, de 8h15 à 9h. Il répondra aussi aux questions des auditeurs. Un entretien à suivre en direct vidéo Plus d’info:

entry.title: Mohd Khairuddin says family members questioned in Bukit Aman, satisfied with police investigations

link.title: Mohd Khairuddin says family members questioned in Bukit Aman, satisfied with police investigations

entry.content:
Three of Datuk Dr Mohd Khairuddin Aman Razali’s family members have had their statements recorded by the police over investigation into the minister’s breach of self-quarantine.
Speaking to reporters at Dewan Tan Sri Ghazali Jawi in Slim River on Friday (Aug 28), the Plantation Industries and Commodities Minister said apart from him, his family members had their statements recorded in Bukit Aman and that he was satisfied with the investigations conducted.
Read more at
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: Three of Datuk Dr Mohd Khairuddin Aman Razali’s family members have had their statements recorded by the police over investigation into the minister’s breach of self-quarantine. Speaking to reporters at Dewan Tan Sri Ghazali Jawi in Slim River on Friday (Aug 28), the Plantation Industries and Commodities Minister said apart from him, his family members had their statements recorded in Bukit Aman and that he was satisfied with the investigations conducted. Read more at WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: TikTok : అమెరికాలో యాప్‌ నిషేధించినా ఏదో దారిలో ప్రజలను అలరిస్తాం ! - American TikTok Chief

link.title: TikTok : అమెరికాలో యాప్‌ నిషేధించినా ఏదో దారిలో ప్రజలను అలరిస్తాం ! - American TikTok Chief

entry.content:
చైనాతో వాణిజ్య యుద్ధంలో భాగంగా ఆ దేశానికి చెందిన టిక్‌ టాక్‌ యాప్‌పై నిషేధం విధిస్తూ అమెరికా అధ్యక్షుడు డొనాల్డ్‌ ట్రంప్‌ తీసుకున్న నిర్ణయానికి టిక్‌ టాక్ భారీ కౌంటర్‌ ఇచ్చింది. అమరికాలో యాప్ నిషేధిస్తూ ట్రంప్ తీసుకున్న నిర్ణయాన్ని ఉల్లంఘిస్తూ వెబ్‌ సైట్‌ నిర్వహించేందుకు సిద్దమని ప్రకటించింది. దీంతో ట్రంప్‌కు భారీ షాక్‌ తగిలినట్లయింది.
#TikTok
#trump
#TikTokWebsite
#DonaldTrump
#UnitedStates
#VanessaPappas
#chinesemobileapp
#TikTokVideos
entry.summary: చైనాతో వాణిజ్య యుద్ధంలో భాగంగా ఆ దేశానికి చెందిన టిక్‌ టాక్‌ యాప్‌పై నిషేధం విధిస్తూ అమెరికా అధ్యక్షుడు డొనాల్డ్‌ ట్రంప్‌ తీసుకున్న నిర్ణయానికి టిక్‌ టాక్ భారీ కౌంటర్‌ ఇచ్చింది. అమరికాలో యాప్ నిషేధిస్తూ ట్రంప్ తీసుకున్న నిర్ణయాన్ని ఉల్లంఘిస్తూ వెబ్‌ సైట్‌ నిర్వహించేందుకు సిద్దమని ప్రకటించింది. దీంతో ట్రంప్‌కు భారీ షాక్‌ తగిలినట్లయింది. #TikTok #trump #TikTokWebsite #DonaldTrump #UnitedStates #VanessaPappas #chinesemobileapp #TikTokVideos

entry.title: Bear Grylls Reviews Survival Movies, Part 2

link.title: Bear Grylls Reviews Survival Movies, Part 2

entry.content:
Bear Grylls is back reviewing how realistic survival movies are, including ‘Life of Pi,’ ‘All Is Lost,’ ‘The Edge,’ ‘The Grey,’ ‘Into the Wild’ and jungle. Bear rates each based on their believability and draws from his own life experiences.
World’s Toughest Race: Eco-Challenge Fiji is available to stream on Amazon Prime!
entry.summary: Bear Grylls is back reviewing how realistic survival movies are, including ‘Life of Pi,’ ‘All Is Lost,’ ‘The Edge,’ ‘The Grey,’ ‘Into the Wild’ and jungle. Bear rates each based on their believability and draws from his own life experiences. World’s Toughest Race: Eco-Challenge Fiji is available to stream on Amazon Prime!

entry.title: #PranabMukherjee : మాజీ రాష్ట్రపతి Pranab Mukherjee ఇక లేరు! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: #PranabMukherjee : మాజీ రాష్ట్రపతి Pranab Mukherjee ఇక లేరు! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
భారతరత్న, మాజీ రాష్ట్రపతి ప్రణబ్ ముఖర్జీ ఇక లేరు. తీవ్ర అనారోగ్యంతో బాధపడుతోన్న ఆయన దేశ రాజధాని కంటోన్మెంట‌లో గల సైనిక ఆసుపత్రిలో చికిత్స పొందుతూ కొద్దిసేపటి కిందటే కన్నుమూశారు.
#PranabMukherjee
#RIPPranabMukherjee
#PranabMukherjeeIsNoMore
#FormerPresident
#PMModi
#CongressParty
#RahulGandhi
entry.summary: భారతరత్న, మాజీ రాష్ట్రపతి ప్రణబ్ ముఖర్జీ ఇక లేరు. తీవ్ర అనారోగ్యంతో బాధపడుతోన్న ఆయన దేశ రాజధాని కంటోన్మెంట‌లో గల సైనిక ఆసుపత్రిలో చికిత్స పొందుతూ కొద్దిసేపటి కిందటే కన్నుమూశారు. #PranabMukherjee #RIPPranabMukherjee #PranabMukherjeeIsNoMore #FormerPresident #PMModi #CongressParty #RahulGandhi

entry.title: 6 Penumpang Pesawat Positif Corona, Rute Terbang Batik Air Jakarta - Pontianak Stop Sementara

link.title: 6 Penumpang Pesawat Positif Corona, Rute Terbang Batik Air Jakarta - Pontianak Stop Sementara

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Dinas Kesehatan Kalimantan Barat menemukan ada enam penumpang pesawat Batik Air, dari Jakarta tujuan Pontianak, terkonfirmasi positif virus corona atau Covid-19.
Terkait hal ini, rute Batik Air dari Bandara Soekarno-Hatta di Banten ke Bandara Supadio di Pontianak tidak beroperasi sementara.
Mencegah penyebaran virus corona, Dinkes Kalimantan Barat melakukan tes swab terhadap 30 penumpang pesawat Batik Air dari Jakarta tujuan Pontianak.
Hasilnya, didapati sebanyak enam penumpang terkonfirmasi positif corona pada 15 Agustus 2020 lalu.
Lolosnya pemantauan kesehatan para penumpang ini diduga karena faktor tidak akuratnya alat pemeriksaan hingga dugaan surat keterangan yang tidak valid.
Dengan adanya kasus ini, Pemerintah Provinsi Kalbar akan terus melakukan tes swab di bandara.
Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar kamu semua tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Dinas Kesehatan Kalimantan Barat menemukan ada enam penumpang pesawat Batik Air, dari Jakarta tujuan Pontianak, terkonfirmasi positif virus corona atau Covid-19. Terkait hal ini, rute Batik Air dari Bandara Soekarno-Hatta di Banten ke Bandara Supadio di Pontianak tidak beroperasi sementara. Mencegah penyebaran virus corona, Dinkes Kalimantan Barat melakukan tes swab terhadap 30 penumpang pesawat Batik Air dari Jakarta tujuan Pontianak. Hasilnya, didapati sebanyak enam penumpang terkonfirmasi positif corona pada 15 Agustus 2020 lalu. Lolosnya pemantauan kesehatan para penumpang ini diduga karena faktor tidak akuratnya alat pemeriksaan hingga dugaan surat keterangan yang tidak valid. Dengan adanya kasus ini, Pemerintah Provinsi Kalbar akan terus melakukan tes swab di bandara. Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar kamu semua tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.

entry.title: THE BATMAN Trailer (2021)

link.title: THE BATMAN Trailer (2021)

entry.content:
Official The Batman Movie Trailer 2021		 Subscribe ➤ Robert Pattinson Movie Trailer Release: 1 Oct 2021 More
A point-of-view driven noir tale set in the 90s with heavy focus on Batman’s detective work. A stand-alone story with no connection to the DCEU.
The Batman (2021) is the new action movie starring Robert Pattinson, Zoë Kravitz and Andy Serkis.
Note		 #Batman #Trailer courtesy of Warner Bros. Pictures Germany. All Rights Reserved. #KinoCheck®
entry.summary: Official The Batman Movie Trailer 2021 Subscribe ➤ Robert Pattinson Movie Trailer Release: 1 Oct 2021 More A point-of-view driven noir tale set in the 90s with heavy focus on Batman’s detective work. entry.title: ನಾವು ಏನು ಮಾಡಿಲ್ಲ ಎಂದು Indiaಕ್ಕೆ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟನೆ ಕೊಟ್ಟ China Oneindia Kannada

link.title: ನಾವು ಏನು ಮಾಡಿಲ್ಲ ಎಂದು Indiaಕ್ಕೆ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟನೆ ಕೊಟ್ಟ China Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
Chinese Troops Never Cross LAC: China Foreign Ministry Clarification.
#India #China #BordarConflict
ಭಾರತ ಚೀನಾ ಗಡಿ ಪ್ರದೇಶದಲ್ಲಿ ಯಾವುದೇ ಸಂದರ್ಭದಲ್ಲೂ ಚೀನಾದ ಸೇನಾಪಡೆಯು ನಿಗದಿತ ಗಡಿ ರೇಖೆ ದಾಟಿಲ್ಲ ಎಂದು ಚೀನಾ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟನೆ ನೀಡಿದೆ. ಪ್ಯಾಂಗಾಂಗ್ ತ್ಸೋ ಸರೋವರದ ಬಳಿ ಪ್ರಚೋದನಾತ್ಮಕ ಸೇನಾ ಚಟುವಟಿಕೆ ನಡೆಸುತ್ತಿರುವ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಭಾರತೀಯ ಸೇನೆ ಹೇಳಿತ್ತು.
entry.summary: Chinese Troops Never Cross LAC: China Foreign Ministry Clarification. #India #China #BordarConflict ಭಾರತ ಚೀನಾ ಗಡಿ ಪ್ರದೇಶದಲ್ಲಿ ಯಾವುದೇ ಸಂದರ್ಭದಲ್ಲೂ ಚೀನಾದ ಸೇನಾಪಡೆಯು ನಿಗದಿತ ಗಡಿ ರೇಖೆ ದಾಟಿಲ್ಲ ಎಂದು ಚೀನಾ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟನೆ ನೀಡಿದೆ. ಪ್ಯಾಂಗಾಂಗ್ ತ್ಸೋ ಸರೋವರದ ಬಳಿ ಪ್ರಚೋದನಾತ್ಮಕ ಸೇನಾ ಚಟುವಟಿಕೆ ನಡೆಸುತ್ತಿರುವ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಭಾರತೀಯ ಸೇನೆ ಹೇಳಿತ್ತು.

entry.title: Sushant Singh Rajput was worried about money: Exclusive audio tapes

link.title: Sushant Singh Rajput was worried about money: Exclusive audio tapes

entry.content: India Today has accessed audio tapes of certain conversations between Sushant Singh Rajput, Rhea Chakraborty, his wealth managers as well as his private managers that are crucial in understanding the curious case of the 34-year-old actor’s death. These are some of Sushant’s last conversations and imply the various thoughts that he was pondering upon prior to his death. An acclaimed forensic examiner has verified that the voice heard in the recordings indeed is of Sushant Singh Rajput. In addition to that, the forensic examiner has also confirmed that these recordings have not been tampered with.
entry.summary: India Today has accessed audio tapes of certain conversations between Sushant Singh Rajput, Rhea Chakraborty, his wealth managers as well as his private managers that are crucial in understanding the curious case of the 34-year-old actor’s death. These are some of Sushant’s last conversations and imply the various thoughts that he was pondering upon prior to his death. An acclaimed forensic examiner has verified that the voice heard in the recordings indeed is of Sushant Singh Rajput. In addition to that, the forensic examiner has also confirmed that these recordings have not been tampered with.

entry.title: Rentrée scolaire : le casse-tête des cantines

link.title: Rentrée scolaire : le casse-tête des cantines

entry.content:
A l’école, les masques seront obligatoires à partir de 11 ans, y compris lors des récréations. Les cantines, en revanche, risquent de ne pas pouvoir accueillir tout le monde.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: A l’école, les masques seront obligatoires à partir de 11 ans, y compris lors des récréations. Les cantines, en revanche, risquent de ne pas pouvoir accueillir tout le monde. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
